creator: rootrider@shellfront.org
text:
Created attachment 177696
poudriere log for git subtree build failure

devel/git fails to build when the subtree option is selected. I receive an "xmlto" error:
xmlto: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/git/work/git-2.11.0/contrib/subtree/git-subtree.xml does not validate (status 1)
xmlto: Fix document syntax or use --skip-validation option
Unknown option --postvalid

See attached poudriere log.

The build works fine if I leave other options as-is and remove the subtree option.
